name: preview-editor-scroll-sync
title: Markpad: synchronize preview scroll back to editor
original_prompt:
$adhoc-sdlc
Znalazłem takiego baga śmiesznego do synchronicznego synchronizowane tego skrotu przewijania 2 okien, czyli okna te. Owego i i podglądu mianowicie jeżeli s kroluje okno tekstowe to działa to dobrze, ale jak skontroluję okno podglądu to okno tekstu nie jest synchronizowane.

entries.note: Start wykonania: potwierdzony błąd asymetrii scroll sync; root-cause w kruchym wyborze preview anchor na podstawie top-level data-sourcepos.
RED: dodany test previewScrollSync wymaga helpera kotwicy preview scrolla i oblał obecny kod na braku PreviewScrollAnchor oraz getPreviewScrollAnchor.

GREEN: dodany PreviewScrollAnchor i getPreviewScrollAnchor; preview scroll wybiera aktywny albo najbliższy element z data-sourcepos, a syncEditorToPreviewScroll oraz handleScroll korzystają z tego samego helpera.

verification.command: npx tsx --test scripts/previewScrollSync.test.ts && npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts && npm run check
verification.outcome: Targeted test passed: npx tsx --test scripts/previewScrollSync.test.ts -> 1/1; full script suite passed: npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts -> 57/57; npm run check -> 0 errors, 0 warnings.
npm run build passed; /tmp/markpad-npm-build.log scan found no warning/error matches.

verification.command: npm run tauri build -- --runner cargo-xwin --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle --ci && sha256sum -c release/windows/SHA256SUMS.txt
verification.outcome: Windows build passed: npm run tauri build -- --runner cargo-xwin --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle --ci exited 0; /tmp/markpad-windows-build.log scan found no warning/error matches; release/windows/Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe checksum verified.

verification.command: npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts && npm run check && sha256sum -c release/windows/SHA256SUMS.txt && git diff --check
verification.outcome: Final gate passed: fresh npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts -> 57/57; npm run check -> 0 errors, 0 warnings; sha256sum -c -> OK; git diff --check -> clean; build log scans -> no warning/error matches.

final_result: Done: preview-to-editor scroll sync now uses a resilient source-position anchor helper, regression coverage was added, and the Windows portable release artifact was rebuilt.
